epic.name: Documentation & Developer Experience
epic.objective: Document setup, API, and development workflows for contributors and users
epic.definition_of_done: README has complete setup instructions, API is documented, and developer can go from clone to running in under 30 minutes

tasks.name: Update README with setup instructions
acceptance_criteria: Slack app setup instructions with required scopes

tasks.name: Create .env.example file
acceptance_criteria: All environment variables listed with descriptions
Example values that are clearly fake
Links to where to obtain values (Slack app, etc.)

tasks.name: Document API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API documentation for v0.1 endpoints
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints documented in docs/API.md or OpenAPI spec

tasks.name: Add sample Alertmanager payload for testing
tasks.description: Provide curl commands for manual testing
acceptance_criteria: curl commands to send to webhook
Instructions in README or separate testing doc
